title: fagraea gitingensis
intro: Fagraea gitingensis, also known as the Philippine frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Fagraea gitingensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce stress. In traditional herbal preparations, Fagraea gitingensis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
